footer.tagline: Applied technology and intelligence for companies that demand real results.

home.subheadline: We turn complex challenges into systems that scale. Applied AI, precision engineering and jargon-free consulting — for companies that demand real results.
home.servicesSubtitle: Four practice areas. One delivery standard.
home.s1Desc: From language models to autonomous decision systems. We build AI that works in production, not in demos.
home.s2Desc: Mission-critical software. APIs, web platforms and distributed systems built to scale and last.
home.s3Desc: Technology strategy with judgment. Architecture and team decisions that don't cost you later.
home.s4Desc: Marketing systems that generate measurable growth. SEO, paid campaigns and content — focused on real metrics.

servicios.subheadline: Four practice areas. One delivery standard: on time, with judgment, built to last.

trabajo.ctaHeadline: Want to be the next case?

nosotros.label: About
nosotros.subheadline: We're not a feature factory. We're a team that takes every project it chooses seriously.
nosotros.medellinTitle: Built in one of the world's most exciting tech cities.
nosotros.medellinP1: Medellín is no longer just a story of reinvention — it's one of Latin America's leading technology hubs. Google, Microsoft, Globant, Bancolombia's tech campus, and dozens of high-growth startups operate here. The city has built a serious ecosystem: top engineering universities, a thriving remote-work culture, and a concentration of talent that rivals any region on the continent.
nosotros.medellinP2: It's consistently ranked among the top destinations for digital nomads worldwide — not just for the climate and cost of living, but because the infrastructure, the coworking culture, and the community are genuinely world-class. We're proud to be part of that ecosystem, and to bring that standard to every project we take.
nosotros.ctaSubheadline: We evaluate every project carefully. If we're the right team for your challenge, you'll know in the first conversation.
nosotros.whyP1: We believe most software that gets built could be built better. Simpler. With more judgment. More honest about what it can and cannot do.
nosotros.whyP2: JTSolutions was born out of frustration watching well-intentioned projects fail for the wrong reasons: oversized promises, unnecessarily complex architectures, deliverables that impress in demos but don't survive the first month in production.
nosotros.whyP3: We work with a deliberately small number of clients per year. Not because we can't grow, but because the model we have — dedicated seniors, independent judgment, real delivery — requires time and attention that cannot be manufactured at scale.
nosotros.v1desc: If something doesn't work or isn't the right solution, we say so before billing it. We'd rather lose a contract than deliver something that doesn't solve the problem.
nosotros.v2desc: Every project is executed by seniors. We don't use client projects to train juniors. Experience is not an extra — it's the minimum standard.
nosotros.v3desc: When we're done, your team can operate and extend what we built. Real documentation, not what gets written on the last day of the sprint.
nosotros.v4desc: We're fast because we're efficient, not because we cut corners. Speed without judgment creates debt that someone pays later — usually the client.

form.mensajePlaceholder: What's the challenge? What have you tried? What's the timeline? More context = better response.
form.errorGlobal: There was an error sending. Try again or write to us directly at
form.successText: We respond in less than 48 hours. If the project is a good fit, we'll schedule a no-commitment call.
